meta.description: Core design tokens for all content creation: social media carousels, reels, UI components, and marketing assets.

primary_bg.usage: Main background color for all designs. The anchor of every carousel, story, reel.

gradient_end.usage: Gradient end color. Used for cards, borders, and subtle highlights.

background_gradient.usage: Primary gradient for carousels, stories, reels backgrounds.

glass_card.usage: Background for glass-effect cards and tables overlaid on the gradient.

text_heading.usage: All headings, hooks, and large impactful titles.

text_body.usage: Body text, explanations, and descriptive copy.

accent_cta.usage: PRIMARY ACCENT — CTAs, highlighted numbers, key Arabic keywords. Use sparingly: 2–3 words MAX per design.

font_heading.usage: ALL headings and hooks. Hook = Cairo Black (900). Sub-heading = Cairo Regular (400).

photography.rule_1: Natural, real-life photos — no over-produced imagery

video.rule_1: Talking-head style with B-roll from actual work
video.rule_2: Captions are MANDATORY on every video
video.rule_3: Hook in first 3 seconds — no exceptions

carousels_posts.card_style: rgba(255,255,255,0.15) glass effect with soft borders
